name: Figma Creative
description: Clean, design-tool aesthetic featuring warm grays, active cursor accent points, and rounded components.
promptBlock: Style: Figma workspace. Base background is neutral gray (#f5f5f5) with pure white panel cards (#ffffff). Borders are clean and thin (#e5e5e5). Accent color is Figma blue (#0d99ff) representing active tools, cursor highlights, and focus rings. Keep buttons rounded (6px) and active tool badges colorful. Spacing is extremely clean and aligned like a design UI canvas.
